Aura 2.0: The Spatial AI Canvas is Live

Where thoughts shape
reality.

Aura Canvas is a spatial, AI-native workspace for notes, databases, and brainstorms. Organize your mind visually, prompt AI inline, and collaborate instantly.

Interactive Demo

Designed for spatial thinking

Switch between views below to see how Aura organizes notes, documents, and visual layouts natively on one canvas.

Infinite Canvas for Visual Layouts

Break out of rigid linear documents. Connect notes, drag media files, create mindmaps, and design your personal database structures in a free-flowing spatial canvas.

  • Unlimited canvas sizing with smooth vector zooming.
  • Bidirectional linking between visual shapes and text documents.
  • Support for videos, PDFs, widgets, and dynamic code blocks.
User Journey Map
Analyze user drop-off during onboarding flow.
Core Solution
Integrate dynamic HSL-based cards.
Launch Plan
Publish landing page by Wednesday!

Inline AI: Command your workspace

With Aura AI Copilot, your notes write themselves. Highlight any node to synthesize data, query your entire canvas, auto-generate action lists, or translate concepts instantly.

  • Context-aware prompts that search across your visual nodes.
  • Automatic document summarization and markdown tables creation.
  • Integrated code assistant that writes and runs JS/Python snippets.
# Product Requirements Document
/ai generate user persona for a designer
✦ Aura AI

Persona: Creative Chloe (28)
• Goal: Wants visual, non-linear organization.
• Pain points: Messy notes across Slack, Notion, and FigJam.

Real-time Multiplayer Collaboration

Work together as if you're in the same room. Aura's state engine replicates cursor coordinates, page updates, and comments at sub-100ms latency globally.

  • Live multiplayer cursor tracking with distinct usernames and colors.
  • Inline floating comments with markdown, attachments, and emojis.
  • Robust conflict-free replicated data types (CRDTs) to prevent sync overlaps.
Brainstorming Board
Chloe
Alex
Alex
Should we use a gradient here?
Features

Everything you need to create

Aura combines the power of structured documents, visual notes, and AI intelligence in one fast desktop and mobile web app.

Spatial Brainstorming

Connect notes in 2D space. Map relations visually with cards, shapes, custom colors, and arrows to easily track projects.

Contextual AI Copilot

Our embedded AI understands your canvas layout. Highlight nodes to run queries, summarize text, or draft documentation instantly.

Multiplayer Presence

Work side-by-side with your team members in real-time. Share cursor coordinates, chat in-canvas, and edit together.

Instant Command Menu

Trigger commands instantly. Press `Cmd + K` or `Ctrl + K` to search files, run AI prompts, or switch layout tools without typing menus.

Relational Databases

Structure your work your way. Create tables, boards, timelines, calendars, and checklists inside your visual notes workspace.

Bi-Directional Sync

Integrate with Slack, Notion, GitHub, and Figma. Watch your external databases update in real-time as you drag and edit notes.

Pricing Plans

Scale canvas for your needs

Get started with a free sandbox workspace, or scale up to unlock premium features and advanced cloud AI models.

Monthly Billed Yearly Billed Save 20%

Starter

Perfect for individual visual note-taking.

$ 0 /month
  • Unlimited local canvas boards
  • 50 active AI prompt executions
  • Up to 3 editors per board
  • PDF/Markdown Export
Start Free Sandbox
Most Popular

Pro

For advanced builders and power thinkers.

$ 12 /month
  • Everything in Starter, plus:
  • Unlimited cloud AI model calls
  • Context-aware search across files
  • Version history up to 30 days
  • Premium plugins and databases
Get Started with Pro

Team

For collaborative workgroups and startups.

$ 30 /month
  • Everything in Pro, plus:
  • Unlimited team members/editors
  • Rich workspace permission structures
  • SAML SSO & custom domains
  • Dedicated support engineer
Upgrade Team Workspace
FAQ

Got questions? We have answers.

Learn more about how Aura works, security, and migration options.

Yes. All communication uses end-to-end TLS encryption. Your documents and database columns are encrypted at rest using AES-256 keys. We never train our core AI foundation models on your private database entries or canvas boards without your explicit opt-in consent.

Absolutely. Aura uses a local-first architecture. It caches all your boards directly on your device via SQLite. You can fully browse, edit, create new canvases, and configure nodes offline. Changes sync immediately once a connection is detected.

Aura provides native integrations via our Integrations Dashboard. Simply click the integration icon, authorize your account, and you can pull Notion databases as live-refreshing canvas tables or map GitHub issue tickets into visual flowcharts on your canvas.

Yes! We support students, teachers, and researchers. Students and academic staff get access to our Pro workspace features for free. Simply sign up with a valid educational email address (`.edu`, etc.) to activate your discount automatically.

Build your mind on canvas.

Join thousands of builders, designers, and software engineers who use Aura to map, search, and design their product ideas visually.
